text.title: Launch Tier Decision Frame Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the Applies-If preconditions hold AND none of the Skip-If disqualifiers fire?

branch.question: Are the Prerequisites artefacts present AND cited with evidence?

branch.conclusion: Run the methodology — produce the artefact per output contract.
Pause; gather missing Prerequisites with cited evidence before run.
Skip this methodology. Name the failing Applies-If condition or the firing Skip-If disqualifier.

text.example: funnel_goal=signups readiness=[cap:OK,sup:6h,rb:yes] retreat_cost=200-signup-graveyard → tier=3 (PH-day) per r1+r2.
